text.en:
If your Army Faction is **CHAOS KNIGHTS,** each unit from your army with this ability gains Dread abilities, depending which are active for your army (see below). The Deathly Terror ability is active for your army from the start of the battle. In addition, at the start of the first, third and fifth battle rounds, you can either select one of the other Dread abilities or randomly select two Dread abilities to apply by rolling two D6 and applying the results rolled, from those numbered 1-6 below.

Any Dread abilities that have been selected are active until the end of the battle. You cannot select the same Dread ability more than once, and any duplicated Dread abilities (as a result of randomly selecting them) have no additional effect.
While an enemy unit is within 9" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1
While an enemy unit is within 9" of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. This is cumulative with the Deathly Terror ability [see above].
Each time this model makes an attack, if the target of that attack is Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Wound roll.
In the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, for each enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength and within 9" of this model, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.
While an enemy unit that is Below Half-strength is within 9" of this model, each time that unit fails a Battle-shock test, it suffers D3 mortal wounds.
Add 3"to the range of this model’s Aura abilities.

Each time a model with this ability makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding **TITANIC** models) and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height. When doing so:

■ It can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.
■ It can also move through sections of terrain features that are more than 4" in height, but if it does, after it has moved, roll one D6: on a 1, that model is Battle-shocked.

If every model in your army has the **CHAOS** keyword, you can include either 1 **TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS** model or up to 3 **WAR DOG** models in your army, even if they do not have the Faction keyword you selected in the Select Army Faction step. None of these models can be your **WARLORD**, and they cannot be given Enhancements.

Improve the Objective Control characteristic of **CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER** models from your army by 2. In addition, once per battle round, if your **WARLORD** is on the battlefield, you can use the Claimed for the Dark Gods Stratagem for 0CP.

In your Command phase, one or more **CHAOS KNIGHTS** units from your army can make a Malefic Surge. Each one that does must first take a Leadership test; if that test is failed, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Then, until the start of your next Command phase, that unit is Empowered. While a unit is Empowered it can use one of the Malefic Surge abilities below. Once that unit has used a Malefic Surge ability, it is no longer Empowered.

■ **Unholy Hunger:** When a model in this unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, until the end of the phase, add 3" to its Move characteristic.

■ **Diabolic Power:** When this unit is selected to shoot or fight, select either the **[LETHAL HITS]** or **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in this unit have the selected ability.

■ **Unnatural Fortitude:** When this unit is selected as the target of an attack, select one of the following to apply until the end of the phase:
▪ Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.
▪ Models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

**Designer’s Note:** *We recommend placing a token next to Chaos Knights models that are Empowered, removing it once they have used a Malefic Surge ability, and removing all unused tokens at the start of your Command phase*
Friendly Knight Tyrant units’ attacks that target a battle-shocked unit have +1 to the hit roll.
text.de: Attacken befreundeter Tyrannenritter-Einheiten gegen eine erschütterte Einheit haben +1 auf den Trefferwurf.
text.es: Los ataques de las unidades Caballero Tirano amigas que tomen como blanco una unidad acobardada tienen +1 a las tiradas para impactar.
text.fr: Les attaques des unités de Chevalier Tyran amies qui ciblent une unité ébranlée ont +1 aux jets de touche.
text.it: Gli attacchi delle unità di Cavalieri Tyrant amiche che hanno come bersaglio un’unità Traumatizzata hanno +1 ai tiri per colpire.
text.ja: 味方ナイト・タイラント・ユニットの攻撃が戦闘ショック状態のユニットを攻撃対象としている場合、ヒットロールに+1の修正を受ける。
text.ko: 아군 폭군 기사 유닛의 공격이 전투충격 상태인 유닛을 대상으로 지정했다면 명중 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
text.zh: 己方暴君骑士单位对一个处于战斗震慑状态的单位所进行的攻击的命中掷骰结果 +1。

text.en:
If a **TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army has an Aura ability that affects friendly **WAR DOG** units, while two or more friendly **WAR DOG** models are within range of that **TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit’s Aura ability, that **TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit is affected by that Aura ability as well.

**Example:** *Two friendly War Dog models are within 9” of a Knight Desecrator when it is selected to shoot. As a result, the Knight Desecrator’s Taskmaster ability also affects itself, even though it does not have the War Dog keyword, so each time that Knight Desecrator makes a ranged attack, Hit rolls of 1 are re‑rolled.*

At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent’s army. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a **WAR DOG** model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if that unit is visible to the attacking model, that attack has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

At the start of the first battle round, after selecting one or more Dread abilities to be active for your army, you can select one additional Dread ability to be active for your army (this additional Dread ability cannot be randomly selected).

• You can include Damned units in your army (see Codex: Chaos Space Marines). The combined points cost of such units cannot exceed 500 points.
  • Friendly Damned units can re‑roll leadership rolls.
text.de:
• Du kannst verdammte Einheiten in deine Armee aufnehmen (siehe Codex: Chaos Space Marines). Der Gesamtpunktwert solcher Einheiten darf 500 Punkte nicht überschreiten.
  • Befreundete verdammte Einheiten können Moralwertwürfe wiederholen.
text.es:
• Puedes incluir unidades Condenado en tu ejército (ver Codex: Chaos Space Marines). El valor en puntos total de esas unidades no puede superar los 500 puntos.
  • Las unidades Condenado amigas pueden repetir sus tiradas de liderazgo.
text.fr:
• Vous pouvez inclure des unités Damnées dans votre armée (voir Codex : Chaos Space Marines). Le coût en points combiné de ces unités ne peut pas dépasser 500 points.
  • Les unités Damnées amies peuvent relancer les jets de commandement.
text.it:
• Puoi includere unità Dannate nella tua armata (vedi Codex: Chaos Space Marines). Il costo in punti combinato di tali unità non può superare 500 punti.
  • Le unità Dannate amiche possono ripetere i tiri disciplina.
text.ja:
• 自軍には呪われし者・ユニットを編入できる（『コデックス：ケイオス・スペースマリーン』を参照）。それらのユニットの合計ポイント数は500ポイントを超えてはならない。
  • 味方呪われし者・ユニットは指揮統制ロールをリロールできる。
text.ko:
• 전락자 유닛을 플레이어의 군대에 편성할 수 있습니다(코덱스: 카오스 스페이스 마린 참고). 이러한 유닛을 편성할 수 있는 총 포인트 비용은 500포인트를 넘을 수 없습니다.
  • 아군 전락자 유닛이 통솔력 체크를 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
text.zh:
• 您可以将受诅咒者单位纳入己方军队中（参见《圣典：混沌星际战士》)。可纳入单位的点数值总和不能超过 500 点。
  • 己方受诅咒者单位可以重掷领导力掷骰。

text.en: (Once per battle round, per army) In your Shooting phase, you can select one visible enemy unit within 12" of a friendly War Dog unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range. This detachment has the War Dogs tag and cannot be taken with another War Dogs detachment.
text.de: (Einmal pro Schlachtrunde, pro Armee) In deiner Fernkampfphase kannst du eine für eine befreundete Kriegshund-Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12" wählen. Jene feindliche Einheit hat +6" Entdeckungsreichweite. Dieses Kontingent hat die Kennzeichnung Kriegshunde und kann nicht zusammen mit einem anderen Kontingent mit der Kennzeichnung Kriegshunde gewählt werden.
text.es: (Una vez por ronda de batalla, por ejército) En tu fase de disparo, puedes elegir 1 unidad enemiga visible y a 12" o menos de alguna unidad Perro de la Guerra amiga. Esa unidad enemiga tiene +6" al alcance de detección. Este destacamento tiene la etiqueta Perros de la Guerra y no puede incluirse junto a otro destacamento Perros de la Guerra.
text.fr: (Une fois par round de bataille, par armée) À votre phase de Tir, vous pouvez choisir une unité ennemie visible à 12" ou moins d’une unité de Dogue amie. L’unité ennemie choisie a +6" en portée de détection. Ce détachement a l’étiquette Dogues et ne peut pas être pris avec un autre détachement de Dogues.
text.it: (Una volta per round di battaglia, per armata) Nella tua fase di Tiro puoi scegliere un’unità nemica visibile entro 12" da un’unità di War Dog amica. Quell’unità nemica ha +6" alla distanza di individuazione. Questo distaccamento ha il descrittore War Dog e non può essere preso con un altro distaccamento War Dog.
text.ja: （アーミーごとに、各バトルラウンドにつき1回）自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方ウォードッグ・ユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、 視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択してもよい。選択された敵ユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。 このデタッチメントはウォードッグタグを持ち、他のウォードッグタグを持つデタッチメントと同時に編制できない。
text.ko: (군대를 통틀어 전투당 한 번) 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 전쟁견 유닛의 12" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어오는 적 유닛을 하나 지정할 수 있습니다. 그 적 유닛에 발각 범위 +6"가 적용됩니다. 이 디태치먼트에 전쟁견 태그가 부여되며 다른 전쟁견 디태치먼트와 함께 선택할 수 없습니다.
text.zh: （每支军队，每个战斗轮次限一次）在您的射击阶段中，您可以选择位于一个己方 战犬级单位 12" 内且可见的一个敌方单位。被选择的敌方单位的侦测范围 +6"。 本分遣队拥有战犬标签，并且不能与另一个拥有战犬标签的分遣队被一同纳入军队中。

target.en: One **CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army that is not Empowered.

when.en: End of any phase.

effect.en: Your unit makes a Malefic Surge.

restrictions.en: You cannot select the same unit as the target of this Stratagem more than once per battle round.

fluff.en: Some Fallen Nobles are conjoined, symbiotically or parasitically, with the hideous systems of their Chaos Knight. This allows them to channel more unholy energies, though not without risk.

target.en: One **CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: Reinforced with warp-infused materials and warded through ritual blood sacrifice, these Chaos Knights can withstand unnatural levels of punishment.

target.en: One **TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army, and up to two friendly **WAR DOG** units, that have not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit that is an eligible target for each of those **CHAOS KNIGHTS** units. Until the end of the phase, each time one of those **CHAOS KNIGHTS** units is selected to shoot or fight, if that enemy unit is an eligible target, you can only select that enemy unit as the target for all of those attacks and those attacks have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

fluff.en: The scion slaves their servants’ weapons to their own, forming an overwhelming firestorm.

target.en: One **CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: The raw and bestial power of the Warp causes this Chaos Knight to sprout thick mutant scales and layered hide in response to incoming attacks.

target.en: One **TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army and up to three friendly **WAR DOG** units within 6" of that **TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit.

when.en: Start of your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time one of those **WAR DOG** units makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, its models can move through models and terrain features. When doing so, they can move within Engagement Range of such models but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

fluff.en: Urged on by their masters, the War Dogs push hard through the densest terrain.

target.en: Two or more **WAR DOG** units from your army within Engagement Range of the same enemy unit.

when.en: Start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of those **WAR DOG** units. Until the end of the phase, models in those **WAR DOG** units can only target that enemy unit, but each time a model in one of those **WAR DOG** units makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

fluff.en: Eager to get into battle, these War Dogs hope to win glory and prove their worth to peers and masters alike.

target.en: That **WAR DOG** unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a **WAR DOG** unit from your army that has not been **selected to attack** this phase is destroyed.

effect.en: Before resolving your unit’s Deadly Demise ability, it can either shoot or fight. When doing so, it must target only the enemy unit that just destroyed it, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target. After it has done so and after any Consolidation moves have been made, resolve your unit’s Deadly Demise ability as normal.

fluff.en: Many War Dog pilots are bitter and twisted souls whose hearts are filled with animalistic rage, and they will vent that anger with their last dying gasp.

target.en: One **CHAOS KNIGHTS** model from your army that made a Charge move this turn and has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of melee weapons equipped by your model by 1. After your model has finished making its attacks this phase, if it destroyed one or more enemy units this phase, each enemy unit within 6" of your model must take a Battle-shock test.

fluff.en: Chaos Knights leave only death and devastation in their wake, and reduce entire worlds to ruin.

target.en: One **WAR DOG CHARACTER** unit from your army.

when.en: Start of the Shooting phase or the start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test. Each friendly **WAR DOG** unit that is within 6" of your unit and is Battle-shocked must take a Leadership test; if that test is passed, that unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

restrictions.en: You can only use this Stratagem once per turn.

fluff.en: This artificially generated vox-borne rallying cry booms out across multiple wavelengths. It bolsters the courage of fellow War Dog pilots and their steeds, even as it fills the foes’ communications with squealing scrapcode and monstrous howling

target.en: One **CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER** unit from your army that is within range of one or more objective markers you control.

when.en: Start of your Command phase.

effect.en: Select one of those objective markers. That objective marker remains under your control, with a Level of Control of 5 (unless it would otherwise be higher), until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: The Fallen Noble dedicates their latest conquest to the Dark Gods in hope of reward.

target.en: That **CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER** unit. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase, just after a **CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER** unit from your army is destroyed.

effect.en: When rolling to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your unit’s Deadly Demise ability, that model’s Deadly Demise ability inflicts mortal wounds on a D6 roll of a 4+ instead of on a 6.

fluff.en: Determined that tales will be told of their spectacular end, the Fallen Noble overloads the internal generators of their Knight suit, hoping to take their enemy with them into oblivion.

target.en: One **CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1. Each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if that enemy unit is **TITANIC,** you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

fluff.en: The Chaos Knights engage in duels not for honour, but to assert their absolute dominance over the battlefield.

target.en: That **CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just before a **CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER** unit from your army consolidates.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Consolidates, models in it can move an additional 3" as long as your unit can end that move within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: To these Fallen Nobles, each new foe chased down is another opportunity to claim gory trophies.

target.en: That **CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER** unit from your army ends a Normal move.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES)** that your unit moved over during that move and roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound. If one or more models are destroyed as a result of this Stratagem, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

fluff.en: Screaming enemy warriors are crushed to gory paste as the Chaos Knight tramples spitefully through their midst, stamping and raking these unworthy foes with its huge, taloned feet.

target.en: That **CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER** unit.

when.en: Your Command phase, just after a **CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER** unit from your army makes a Malefic Surge.

effect.en: Select one objective marker your unit is within range of that you control. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: The foul energies and unnatural influence of the Chaos Knights spread from them like sorcerous radiation, tainting all they touch.

target.en: Up to two **WAR DOG** units from your army or one **TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in one of your units makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move through models and terrain features. When doing so, it can move within Engagement Range of such models but, unless it made a Charge move, cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them, and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed (the Super-heavy Walker ability does not apply while using this Stratagem).

fluff.en: Employing piloting skill or brute force, Fallen Nobles can either manoeuvre or simply barge their steeds through foes and obstacles alike.

target.en: One **CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

fluff.en: Inscribed into the Knight suit’s servo-skeleton, these markings channel the pilot’s contempt for the foe and manifest it as a sorcerous aura of defence.

target.en: That **CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit.

when.en: Any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to a **CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

fluff.en: This Chaos Knight shrugs off even the most dire hurts as though they are beneath such a mighty, warp‑empowered predator.

target.en: That **CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: No mere prey swirling about their steed’s feet will prevent this scion from focusing their fire.

target.en: One **CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army that lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6"

fluff.en: Firing upon adamantine monsters only goads them to greater wrath and more ferocious bloodshed.

target.en: That **WAR DOG** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after a **WAR DOG** unit from your army Falls Back

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: This War Dog’s pilot knows when to feign flight or give ground, only to redouble their attack the moment their prey’s guard drops.

target.en: One **WAR DOG** unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: War Dogs fight with agility and guile, giving ground only to surge in on the attack from another angle.

target.en: One **WAR DOG** unit from your army that is wholly within 12" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: The War Dogs of the dread household move to outflank and encircle their prey.

target.en: One **CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your model has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability, and the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against attacks made by Battle-shocked models.

fluff.en: Fallen Nobles sneer at the pathetic efforts of their foes, doubly so in the case of those who fear them.

target.en: One **ABHORRENT** model from your army and up to two friendly **WAR DOG** units.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, those **WAR DOG** units are treated as being within range of any Aura abilities your **ABHORRENT** unit has.

fluff.en: The neural connections between Fallen Nobles and doggedly loyal or fearful War.

target.en: One **CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en:
• Your unit has **Stealth**.
• Melee attacks that target your unit have -1 to **hit rolls**.

fluff.en: Through dark rituals and dread pacts, the Chaos Knights draw upon the fear and despair of their foes and bind it into a curse upon the land itself, wreathing themselves in a shrouding pall.

target.en: One **CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: After your unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test; if the test is failed, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, it is aflame. While a unit is aflame, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for it.

fluff.en: These weapons bathe the target in blasts of daemonic balefire that burns flesh and soul alike.

target.en: One **CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability.

fluff.en: Supernatural sensors perceive the soul-spoor of their prey, or even stare forward through fate and time.

target.en: One **CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

fluff.en: Ectoplasmic blood surges hot through glowing conduits as the Fallen Noble feeds power to their Knight suit’s supernaturally enhanced ion shield emitters.

target.en: One **CHAOS KNIGHTS** unit from your army that is within 12" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Any phase, just after an enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test.

effect.en: Roll six D6. For each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound and one model in your unit regains up to 1 lost wound.

restrictions.en: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

fluff.en: Shrieking with hunger, Pterrorshades descend in a whirlwind to feast on the fearful souls of the foe. Their banquet transmutes into vital energy that flows into the Chaos Knight on which they roost.

target.en: That <k>Knight Tyrant</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ナイト・タイラント</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly Knight Tyrant unit is selected to make a fall-back move.
when.de: Deine Bewegungsphase, wenn eine befreundete Tyrannen­ritter-Einheit gewählt wird, eine Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen
when.es: En tu fase de movimiento cuando una unidad Caballero Tirano amiga se elige para hacer un movimiento de retroceder.
when.fr: À votre phase de Mouvement, quand une unité de Chevalier Tyran amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement de retraite.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Movimento, quando un’unità di Cavaliere Tyrant amica viene scelta per effettuare un movimento di ripiegamento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ中、味方ナイト・タイラント・ユニットが退却移動を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 이동 페이즈, 아군 폭군 기사 유닛이 후퇴 이동을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 己方移动阶段中，在一个己方暴君骑士单位被选择进行一次后撤移动时。

effect.en: That move does not prevent your unit from being eligible to shoot.
effect.de: Jene Bewegung verhindert nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, zu schießen.
effect.es: Ese movimiento no impide a tu unidad ser apta para disparar.
effect.fr: Ce mouvement n’empêche pas votre unité d’être éligible pour tirer.
effect.it: Quel movimento non impedisce alla tua unità di essere idonea a tirare.
effect.ja: その移動を行った自軍ユニットは射撃を宣言できる。
effect.ko: 그 이동에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 사격이 가능합니다.
effect.zh: 那次移动不会阻止该己方单位进行射击。

fluff.en: Eager to unleash the full power at their fingertips, the scion of a Knight Tyrant will allow nothing to impede their devastating arsenal.
fluff.de: Die Adlige an Bord dieses Tyrannenritters ist begierig, die Macht in ihren Händen zu entfesseln, und wird nicht zulassen, dass irgendetwas ihr vernichtendes Arsenal abschwächt.
fluff.es: Ansioso por liberar todo el poder que posee, el piloto de un Caballero Tirano no permitirá que nada obstaculice su devastador arsenal.
fluff.fr: Impatient de déchaîner la puissance au bout de ses doigts, le noble déchu d’un Chevalier Tyran ne laissera rien entraver son arsenal dévastateur.
fluff.it: Ansioso di scatenare tutta la potenza a propria disposizione, il pilota di un Cavaliere Tyrant non permette a nulla di intralciare lo sbarramento di fuoco del suo arsenale.
fluff.ja: 圧制騎士の継承者は己の全力を意のままに解き放つことを渇望しており、その破壊兵器を阻もうとする者をすべて殲滅する。
fluff.ko: 폭군 기사를 조종하는 공자는 손놀림 한 번으로 최대 출력을 개방하려 안달이다. 이 궤멸적 포화를 방해하는 것은 그 무엇도 용납지 않을 것이다.
fluff.zh: 暴君骑士的驾驶者迫不及待地想要释放指尖的全部力量，绝不允许敌人阻碍他们的毁灭攻击。

target.en: That <k>Knight Tyrant</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ナイト・タイラント</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Knight Tyrant</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, nachdem eine befreundete <k>Tyrannenritter</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Caballero Tirano</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de <k>Chevalier Tyran</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, dopo che un’unità di <k>Cavaliere Tyrant</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>ナイト・タイラント</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>폭군 기사</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方<k>暴君骑士</k>单位完成射击后。

effect.en:
Select one enemy unit hit by those attacks. That enemy unit is suppressed until the start of your next Command phase:
  • While a unit is suppressed, that unit’s attacks have -1 to hit rolls.
effect.de:
Wähle eine feindliche Einheit, die von mindestens einer jener Attacken getroffen wurde. Jene feindliche Einheit ist bis zum Beginn deiner nächsten Befehlsphase niedergehalten:
  • Solange eine Einheit niedergehalten ist, haben Attacken jener Einheit -1 auf Trefferwürfe.
effect.es:
Elige 1 unidad enemiga en la que haya impactado alguno de esos ataques. Esa unidad enemiga está contenida hasta el inicio de tu siguiente fase de mando:
  • Mientras una unidad esté contenida, sus ataques tienen -1 a las tiradas para impactar.
effect.fr:
Choisissez une unité ennemie touchée par ces attaques. L’unité ennemie est neutralisée jusqu’au début de votre prochaine phase de Commandement :
  • Tant qu’une unité est neutralisée, ses attaques ont -1 aux jets de touche.
effect.it:
Scegli un’unità nemica colpita da quegli attacchi. Quell’unità nemica è soppressa fino all’inizio della tua prossima fase di Comando:
  • Fintanto che un’unità è soppressa, gli attacchi di quell’unità hanno -1 ai tiri per colpire.
effect.ja:
それらの攻撃がヒットしている敵ユニットを1個選択する。次の自軍側指揮フェイズ開始時まで、選択された敵ユニットは制圧状態となる。
  • ユニットが制圧状態である間、そのユニットの攻撃はヒットロールに-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko:
이러한 공격에 명중된 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 플레이어의 다음 지휘 페이즈가 시작될 때까지 그 적 유닛은 제압됩니다.
  • 유닛이 제압된 동안, 그 유닛의 공격에 명중 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh:
选择一个被那些攻击命中的敌方单位。直到下一个己方指挥阶段开始前，那个敌方单位被压制：
  • 当一个单位被压制时，那个单位攻击的命中掷骰结果 -1。

fluff.en: With a spiteful lash of suppressive firepower, a Knight Tyrant reminds its foes of the deferent fear and awe that are the only acceptable attitudes in the presence of such power.
fluff.de: Mit einer hasserfüllten Salve unterdrückender Feuerkraft erinnert ein Tyrannenritter seine Feinde daran, dass unterwürfige Angst und Ehrfurcht die einzigen akzeptablen Verhaltensweisen angesichts seiner Macht sind.
fluff.es: Con rabiosa potencia de fuego supresora, un Caballero Tirano recuerda a sus enemigos que el miedo y la admiración respetuosa son los únicos sentimientos aceptables ante él.
fluff.fr: D’une rafale cinglante, un Chevalier Tyran rappelle à ses ennemis que l’effroi et la stupeur sont les seules attitudes acceptables en présence d’un individu de sa puissance.
fluff.it: Con una sprezzante salva di fuoco di soppressione, un Cavaliere Tyrant ricorda ai nemici che al suo cospetto l’unico atteggiamento accettabile è paura deferente e soggezione.
fluff.ja: 憎悪に満ちた圧倒的な火力によって、圧制騎士は敵に畏怖と恐怖を思い知らせる。この力を前にした時に抱くことが許される感情とは、その二つだけなのだ。
fluff.ko: 폭군 기사의 면전에 허락된 자세란, 그저 쏟아지는 지독한 포화 앞에서 공포와 경외심으로 고개를 조아리는 것뿐이다.
fluff.zh: 在恶毒的火力压制下，暴君骑士提醒着所有敌人，在它如此强大的力量面前，唯一能有的反应就是畏惧。

target.en: That <k>Knight Tyrant</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ナイト・タイラント</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Any phase, when a friendly Knight Tyrant unit suffers a mortal wound.
when.de: Eine beliebige Phase, wenn eine Tyrannenritter-Einheit eine tödliche Verwundung erleidet
when.es: En cualquier fase cuando una unidad Caballero Tirano amiga sufre una herida mortal.
when.fr: À n’importe quelle phase, quand une unité de Chevalier Tyran amie subit une blessure mortelle.
when.it: In qualsiasi fase, quando un’unità di Cavaliere Tyrant amica subisce una ferita mortale.
when.ja: いずれかのフェイズ中、味方ナイト・タイラント・ユニットが致命的ダメージを受けた時。
when.ko: 어느 페이즈든, 아군 폭군 기사 유닛이 치명상을 입을 때.
when.zh: 任意阶段中，在一个己方暴君骑士单位受到一处致命伤时。

effect.en: Your unit has Feel No Pain 5+ against mortal wounds.
effect.de: Deine Einheit hat Verletzungen ignorieren 5+ gegen tödliche Verwundungen.
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene No hay dolor 5+ contra heridas mortales.
effect.fr: Votre unité a Insensible à la Douleur 5+ contre les blessures mortelles.
effect.it: La tua unità ha Insensibile al Dolore 5+ contro le ferite mortali.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは致命的ダメージに対する『痛みを知らぬ者5+』を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位针对致命伤拥有不觉疼痛 5+。

fluff.en: The mightiest of the Chaos Knights are etched with malign wards capable of shielding them from powerful weapons and throwing back esoteric assaults.
fluff.de: Die mächtigsten Chaosritter sind mit dunklen Siegeln beschrieben, die sie vor mächtigen Waffen schützen und esoterische Angriffe zurückschleudern.
fluff.es: Los Caballeros del Caos más poderosos están dotados de malignas protecciones capaces de guardarlos de armas poderosas y repeler asaltos esotéricos.
fluff.fr: Les plus puissants Chevaliers du Chaos sont couverts de maléfices capables de les protéger des armes puissantes et de repousser les assauts ésotériques.
fluff.it: I Cavalieri del Caos più poderosi sono fregiati con protezioni malevole in grado di respingere le armi più potenti e gli assalti esoterici.
fluff.ja: 最も強大な渾沌騎士には禍々しき防呪が刻まれており、強力な兵器や秘技による猛撃を退けることができる。
fluff.ko: 강대한 카오스 기사들은 사악한 수호 술식이 각인되어 적의 위력적인 공격으로부터 지켜주고, 비술적 강습도 튕겨낸다.
fluff.zh: 最为威武的混沌骑士会在装甲上刻下邪恶的守护符文，它们能够帮助抵御强力的武器攻击或击退神秘力量的侵袭。

name.ja: 我らが主の仇敵（ルビ、仇敵：かたき）！

target.en: That enemy unit.

when.en: Any phase, when a friendly Chaos Knights unit is destroyed by an enemy unit.
when.de: Beliebige Phase, wenn eine befreundete Chaosritter-Einheit von einer feindlichen Einheit zerstört wird
when.es: En cualquier fase, cuando una unidad Titánica Caballeros Imperiales amiga sea eliminada por una unidad enemiga.
when.fr: À n’importe quelle phase, quand une unité de Chevaliers du Chaos amie est détruite par une unité ennemie.
when.it: In qualsiasi fase, quando un’unità dei Cavalieri del Caos amica viene distrutta da un’unità nemica.
when.ja: いずれかのフェイズ中、味方ケイオスナイト・ユニットが敵ユニットに撃破された時。
when.ko: 어느 페이즈든, 아군 카오스 기사 유닛이 적 유닛에 의해 파괴됐을 때.
when.zh: 任意阶段中，在一个己方混沌骑士单位被一个敌方单位摧毁时。

effect.en:
That enemy unit is marked until the end of the battle.
  • Friendly Damned units’ attacks that target a marked unit have [Lethal Hits].
effect.de:
Jene feindliche Einheit ist bis zum Ende der Schlacht markiert.
  • Attacken befreundeter verdammter Einheiten gegen eine markierte Einheit haben [Tödliche Treffer].
effect.es:
Esa unidad enemiga está marcada hasta el final de la batalla.
  • Los ataques de las unidades Condenado amigas que tomen como blanco una unidad marcada tienen [Impactos letales].
effect.fr:
Cette unité ennemie est marquée jusqu’à la fin de la bataille.
  • Les attaques des unités Damnées amies qui ciblent une unité marquée ont [Touches Fatales].
effect.it:
Quell’unità nemica è marchiata fino alla fine della battaglia.
  • Gli attacchi delle unità Dannate amiche che hanno come bersaglio un’unità marchiata hanno [Colpi Letali].
effect.ja:
バトル終了時まで、その敵ユニットは標的状態となる。
  • 味方呪われし者・ユニットの攻撃が標的状態のユニットを対象にしている場合、その攻撃は［会心ヒット］を持つ。
effect.ko:
전투가 종료될 때까지 그 적 유닛은 표적이 됩니다.
  • 아군 전락자 유닛의 공격이 표적 유닛을 대상으로 지정하면 그 공격에 [살상타]를 부여합니다.
effect.zh:
直到战斗结束前，那个敌方单位被标记。
  • 己方被诅咒者单位在攻击一个被标记的单位时，攻击拥有[致命一击]。

fluff.en: As the object of their adulation is consumed by fire, mortal worshippers are roused to a desperate fury, seeking vengeance on behalf of their deceased master.
fluff.de: Als das Objekt ihrer Anbetung in Flammen aufgeht, werden die sterblichen Diener von verzweifelter Wut gepackt und streben nach Rache für ihren gefallenen Meister.
fluff.es: Cuando el objeto de su adulación es consumido por el fuego, los adoradores mortales arden en una furia desesperada, buscando venganza en nombre de su amo fallecido.
fluff.fr: Alors que l’objet de leur adulation est consumé par les flammes, les adorateurs mortels sont plongés dans un état de fureur désespérée, et cherchent à venger leur seigneur défunt.
fluff.it: Mentre l’oggetto della loro adulazione viene consumato dalle fiamme, i mortali adoranti sono colti da una furia disperata ed esigono vendetta per il padrone ucciso.
fluff.ja: 崇敬の対象たる存在が炎に呑み込まれると、定命の従僕たちは猛烈な憤怒に駆られ、亡き主の名のもとに復讐を誓い立ち上がる。
fluff.ko: 자신들의 우상이 화마에 집어삼켜지면, 필멸의 추종자들은 영면한 주인을 대신해 그 한을 풀고자 절박한 분노에 타오른다.
fluff.zh: 眼见其顶礼膜拜的对象被烈火吞噬，凡人信徒们被激起绝望的狂怒，誓要为已故的主人复仇。

target.en: One friendly <k>Damned</k> unit.
target.ja: 味方の<k>呪われし者</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>被诅咒者</k>单位。

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.
when.es: Al inicio de tu fase de disparo.
when.fr: Au début de votre phase de Tir.
when.it: All’inizio della tua fase di Tiro.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ開始時。
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段开始时。

effect.en:
Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. That enemy unit is hunted:
  • While a unit is hunted, that unit has +6" detection range.
effect.de:
Wähle eine für deine Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12". Jene feindliche Einheit wird gejagt:
  • Solange eine Einheit gejagt wird, hat sie +6" Entdeckungsreichweite.
effect.es:
Elige 1 unidad enemiga visible y a 12" o menos de tu unidad. Esa unidad enemiga está cazada:
  • Mientras una unidad esté cazada, tiene +6" al alcance de detección.
effect.fr:
Choisissez une unité ennemie visible et à 12" ou moins de votre unité. L’unité ennemie est traquée :
  • Tant qu’une unité est traquée, elle a +6" en portée de détection.
effect.it:
Scegli un’unità nemica visibile entro 12" dalla tua unità. Quell’unità nemica è braccata:
  • Fintanto che un’unità è braccata, quell’unità ha +6" alla distanza di individuazione.
effect.ja:
自軍ユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットは獲物状態となる：
  • ユニットが獲物状態である間、そのユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 12" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어오는 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛은 사냥당합니다.
  • 유닛이 사냥당하는 동안에는, 그 유닛에 발각 범위 +6"를 적용합니다.
effect.zh:
选择一个位于您的单位 12" 内的可见敌方单位。那个敌方单位被狩猎：
  • 在一个单位被狩猎时，那个单位的侦测范围 +6"。

fluff.en: With blaring hunting horns and bellowed calls to their towering masters, mortal thralls signal the location of hiding prey.
fluff.de: Mit kreischenden Jagdhörnern und lautem Gebrüll weisen diese sterblichen Knechte ihre riesenhaften Meister auf die Verstecke ihrer Beute hin.
fluff.es: Con estruendosos cuernos de caza y bramidos a sus imponentes amos, los esclavos mortales señalan la ubicación de sus presas ocultas.
fluff.fr: Des serfs mortels hurlent et sonnent des cors pour signaler une proie cachée à leurs maîtres imposants.
fluff.it: Gli schiavi mortali segnalano la posizione della preda ai torreggianti padroni con fragorosi corni da caccia e richiami assordanti.
fluff.ja: 狩猟笛を高らかに吹き鳴らし、巨躯の主へ向けて大声で叫びつつ、定命の隷属者たちは潜伏する獲物の位置を報せんとする。
fluff.ko: 필멸자 종복들은 사냥 나팔을 불거나 소리를 질러 숨어든 먹잇감의 위치를 자신들의 육중한 주인들에게 알린다.
fluff.zh: 伴随着震耳欲聋的猎号声，以及向其主人发出的怒吼呼唤，凡人奴仆们指明了藏匿猎物的位置。

target.en: One friendly <k>Damned</k> unit (excluding <k>Accursed Cultists</k> units) within 9" of a friendly <k>Chaos Knights</k> model.
target.de: Eine befreundete <k>verdammte</k> Einheit (ausgenommen <k>Verfluchte</k>-<k>Kultisten</k>-Einheiten) innerhalb von 9" um ein befreundetes <k>Chaosritter</k>-Modell
target.es: Una unidad <k>Condenado</k> amiga (salvo <k>Cultistas Malditos</k>) a 9" o menos de alguna miniatura <k>Caballeros del Caos</k> amiga.
target.fr: Une unité <k>Damnée</k> amie (unité de <k>Cultistes Maudits</k> exclues) à 9" ou moins d'une figurine de <k>Chevalier du Chaos</k> amie.
target.it: Un’unità <k>Dannata</k> amica (escluse le unità di <k>Cultisti Malnati</k>) entro 9" da un modello di <k>Cavaliere del Caos</k> amico.
target.ja: 味方<k>ケイオスナイト</k>・兵の9mv以内に一部でも入っている、味方<k>呪われし者</k>・ユニット（<k>アカースド・カルティスト</k>・ユニットを除く）1個。
target.ko: 아군 <k>카오스 기사</k> 모델의 9" 내에 있는 아군 <k>전락자</k> 유닛(<k>저주받은 사교도</k> 유닛 제외) 하나.
target.zh: 一个位于己方<k>混沌骑士</k>模型 9" 内的己方<k>被诅咒者</k>单位（<k>受诅教徒</k>单位除外）。

when.en: Your Command phase.
when.ja: 自軍側指揮フェイズ中。

effect.en:
Select one Chaos Knights model within 9" of your unit and roll D3+3:
  • Your Damned unit suffers that number of mortal wounds.
  • That Chaos Knights model heals that number of wounds.
effect.de:
Wähle ein Chaosritter-Modell innerhalb von 9" um deine Einheit und wirf W3+3:
  • Deine verdammte Einheit erleidet entsprechend viele tödliche Verwundungen.
  • Jenes Chaosritter-Modell wird um entsprechend viele Lebens­punkte geheilt.
effect.es:
Elige 1 miniatura Caballeros del Caos a 9" o menos de tu unidad y tira 1D3+3:
  • Tu unidad Condenado sufre esa cantidad de heridas mortales.
  • Esa miniatura Caballeros del Caos se cura esa cantidad de heridas.
effect.fr:
Choisissez une figurine de Chevalier du Chaos amie à 9" ou moins de votre unité et jetez un D3+3 :
  • Votre unité Damnée subit autant de blessures mortelles que le résultat.
  • Cette figurine de Chevalier du Chaos soigne autant de PV que le résultat.
effect.it:
Scegli un modello di Cavaliere del Caos entro 9" dalla tua unità e tira D3+3:
  • La tua unità Dannata subisce quel numero di ferite mortali.
  • Quel modello di Cavaliere del Caos guarisce quel numero di ferite.
effect.ja:
その自軍ユニットの9mv以内に一部でも入っているケイオスナイト・兵1体を選択し、D3+3をロールする：
  • 自軍呪われし者・ユニットは、そのロール結果に等しいポイントの致命的ダメージを受ける。
  • そのケイオスナイト・兵は、そのロール結果に等しいポイントの【負傷限界】を回復する。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 9" 내에 있는 카오스 기사 모델을 하나 지정해 D3+3을 굴려 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 아군 전락자 유닛이 굴림 값만큼 치명상을 입습니다.
  • 그 카오스 기사 모델이 굴림 값만큼 체력을 회복합니다.
effect.zh:
选择一个位于您的单位 9" 内的混沌骑士模型并掷 D3+3：
  • 您的被诅咒者单位受到掷骰结果数量的致命伤。
  • 那个混沌骑士模型治疗对应数量的耐伤。

fluff.en: The pilots of corrupted Knight suits demand a ritual offering of their serfs, and their mechanical steed feeds upon the victims’ life forces and raw fear.
fluff.de: Die Piloten korrumpierter Ritterrüstungen verlangen nach rituellen Opfergaben von ihrer Dienerschaft. Ihr verdorbenes Gefährt zehrt die Lebenskraft und schiere Angst der Getöteten gierig auf.
fluff.es: Los pilotos de armaduras de Caballero corruptas exigen una ofrenda ritual de sus siervos, y su corcel mecánico se alimenta de la fuerza vital y el miedo puro de las víctimas.
fluff.fr: Les pilotes de Chevaliers corrompus exigent une offrande rituelle de la part de leurs serfs. Leur monture mécanique se repaît ainsi de la peur et de la force vitale des victimes.
fluff.it: I piloti delle armature Cavaliere corrotte richiedono offerte rituali da parte dei servitori, dato che i loro destrieri meccanici si nutrono della forza vitale e della paura delle vittime.
fluff.ja: 堕落した騎士甲冑の操縦者は、従者を儀式的供物として差し出させ、その機械の軍馬は犠牲者の命と純然たる恐怖を吸い上げて糧とする。
fluff.ko: 타락한 기사 슈트에 들어앉은 조종사들은 아랫것들이 산 제물이 되기를 종용한다. 이들의 강철 군마는 그런 희생양의 생명력은 물론 원초적인 공포마저 모조리 들이킨다.
fluff.zh: 这个腐败骑士的驾驶员要求奴仆们进行仪式献祭，而这个机械坐骑能够吸取受害者们的生命能量和恐惧。

target.en: That <k>War Dog</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ウォードッグ</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>War Dog</k> unit.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Kriegshund</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad enemiga toma como blanco una unidad <k>Perro de la Guerra</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de <k>Dogue</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità nemica ha come bersaglio un’unità di <k>War Dog</k> amica.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>ウォードッグ</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象にした時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>전쟁견</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정할 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个己方<k>战犬级</k>单位选为目标时。

effect.en: Your unit has Feel No Pain 5+.
effect.fr: Votre unité a Insensible à la Douleur 5+.
effect.it: La tua unità ha Insensibile al Dolore 5+.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは『痛みを知らぬ者5+』を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位拥有不觉疼痛 5+。

fluff.en: Gripped by a fever to kill and with prey within reach, whatever damage the prey inflicts is smothered by a War Dog’s thrill of the hunt.
fluff.de: Die Kriegshunde werden vom fiebrigen Verlangen erfasst, alles in Reichweite zu töten, und jeder Schaden, den die Beute verursacht, wird von diesem Drang übertüncht.
fluff.es: Presa de la fiebre de matar y con la presa al alcance, cualquier daño que esta inflija es amortiguado por la emoción de caza de un Perro de la Guerra.
fluff.fr: Pris d’une fièvre meurtrière et à portée de la proie, un Dogue ignore les dégâts infligés grâce au frisson de la chasse.
fluff.it: Avvinto dalla brama di uccidere e con il bersaglio in vista, qualunque sia il danno che la preda riesca a infliggere, il Warhound lo ignora grazie al brivido della caccia.
fluff.ja: 殺戮の熱に取り憑かれ、獲物を射程に収めたウォードッグは、敵からいかなる傷を受けようとも、狩りの興奮が収まることはない。
fluff.ko: 살육을 향한 열망에 사로잡힌 데다 때마침 먹잇감이 근처에 있다면, 제아무리 사냥감이 피해를 주려 발버둥 쳐 봤자 전쟁견은 사냥에 격양되어 일절 개의치 않는다.
fluff.zh: 杀戮狂热噬心，猎物近在咫尺——无论猎物造成何种创伤，皆会被战犬那狩猎的狂喜彻底淹没。

target.en: That <k>War Dog</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ウォードッグ</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>WAR DOG</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete <k>Kriegshund</k>-­Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>PERRO DE LA GUERRA</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de <k>Dogue</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, dopo che un’unità <k>War Dog</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>ウォードッグ</k>・ユニットが射撃を完了した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>전쟁견</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 在己方射击阶段中，当一个己方<k>战犬级</k>单位完成射击时。

effect.en: Those attacks do not prevent your unit from being eligible to start an action.
effect.de: Jene Attacken verhindern nicht, dass deine Einheit infrage kommt, eine Aktion zu beginnen.
effect.es: Esos ataques no impiden a tu unidad ser apta para iniciar acciones.
effect.fr: Ces attaques n’empêchent pas votre unité d’être éligible pour entreprendre une action.
effect.it: Quegli attacchi non impediscono alla tua unità di essere idonea a iniziare un’azione.
effect.ja: それらの攻撃を行った自軍ユニットはアクションの開始を宣言できる。
effect.ko: 그 공격에도 불구하고 이 유닛은 특수 행동을 시작할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 那些攻击不会阻止您的单位开始一次行动。

fluff.en: Under the painful neural leash of a Helm Mechanicum, a War Dog pilot’s gory instincts can be overridden to undertake vital operations prioritised by their larger masters.
fluff.de: Unter schmerzhaften neuronalen Peitschenhieben durch seinen Mechanicum-Helm werden die blutrünstigen Instinkte des Kriegshund-Piloten überschrieben, sodass er wichtige Missionen erfüllt, die von seinem größeren Gebieter priorisiert werden.
fluff.es: Bajo la dolorosa atadura neuronal de un Yelmo Mechanicum, los instintos sangrientos de un piloto de Perro de la Guerra pueden anularse para que lleve a cabo operaciones vitales para sus amos.
fluff.fr: Serré au collier neural d'un Heaume Mechanicum, le pilote d'un Dogue peut voir son instinct sanguinaire supplanté par les opérations vitales exigées par leurs maîtres.
fluff.it: Sotto lo straziante giogo neurale di un Elmo Mechanicus, gli istinti selvaggi del pilota di un War Dog possono essere sopraffatti affinché esegua operazioni ritenute prioritarie.
fluff.ja: 機装玉冠がもたらす苦痛の神経拘束により、ウォードッグの操縦者の残虐な衝動は抑え込まれ、大型の甲冑を装着する主が定めた優先目標へと従わされる。
fluff.ko: 메카니쿰 투구의 고통스러운 신경 구속구 덕에 전쟁견 조종사의 살육 본능을 제어해 주인들의 뜻에 따라 작전 우선순위를 조정할 수 있다.
fluff.zh: 在机械头盔的痛苦刺激下，战犬驾驶员的残暴直觉会被覆盖，前去执行主人们发布的重要任务。

target.en: That <k>War Dog</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ウォードッグ</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly War Dog unit within range of an objective.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete Kriegshund-Einheit in Reichweite eines Missionsziels als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga tome como blanco una unidad Perro de la Guerra amiga que esté dentro del alcance de algún objetivo.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de Dogue amie à portée d’un objectif.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica sceglie come bersaglio un’unità di War Dog amica che si trova entro la gittata di un obiettivo.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが、作戦目標の確保範囲内にいる味方ウォードッグ・ユニットを攻撃対象に選択した時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 적 유닛이 목표물의 범위 내에 있는 아군 전쟁견 유닛을 대상으로 지정할 때.
when.zh: 对手的射击阶段中，在一个敌方单位将一个位于目标范围内的己方战犬级单位选为目标时。

effect.en: Ranged attacks that target your unit have ‑1 AP until that enemy unit has attacked.
effect.de: Fernkampfattacken gegen deine Einheit haben -1 DS, bis jene feindliche Einheit attackiert hat.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia que tomen como blanco tu unidad tienen -1 a FP hasta que esa unidad enemiga haya atacado.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir qui ciblent votre unité ont ‑1 en PA jusqu'à ce que cette unité ennemie ait attaqué.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità hanno -1 VP finché quell’unità nemica non ha attaccato.
effect.ja: その敵ユニットの射撃攻撃が終わるまでの間、その自軍ユニットを対象とする射撃攻撃は【貫】に-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 그 적 유닛이 공격을 종료할 때까지 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 원거리 공격에 관통 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 在那个敌方单位完成攻击前，对您的单位进行的远程攻击拥有 -1 AP。

fluff.en: With a prize under their talons, War Dogs are adept at evading the prey’s sight by loping low through cover.
fluff.de: Wenn die Kriegshunde ihre Beute erst in den Krallen haben, sind sie geübt darin, den Blicken ihrer Feinde zu entgehen, indem sie sich in Deckung halten.
fluff.es: Con un premio bajo sus garras, los Perros de la Guerra son expertos en evadir a la presa corriendo a baja altura por la cobertura.
fluff.fr: Une fois leur proie à leur merci, les Dogues ont tendance à se déplacer à couvert pour éviter qu’elle les repère.
fluff.it: Una volta avvistato l’obiettivo, i War Dog sono molto abili nel sottrarsi allo sguardo della preda spostandosi in copertura.
fluff.ja: 標的を定めたウォードッグは、身を低く屈めて遮蔽の間を駆け抜け、獲物の視界から身を隠しつつ接近する。
fluff.ko: 전리품을 발톱 아래 움켜쥔 전쟁견은 엄폐물 사이로 몸을 낮춰 성큼성큼 달려 사냥감의 시야를 피하는 데 능숙하다.
fluff.zh: 在战利品落入了魔爪之后，战犬十分擅长利用掩体来回避猎物的视线。

name.ja: 苛烈なる競合（アップグレード）

description.en: <k>Executioner</k> unit only. This unit’s ranged attacks have <k>[Ignores Cover]</k>.
description.de: Nur für eine <k>Bluthund</k>-Einheit. Die Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit haben <k>[Deckung ignorieren]</k>.
description.es: Solo unidad <k>Verdugo</k>. Los ataques a distancia de esta unidad tienen <k>[Ignora cobertura]</k>.
description.fr: Unité d’<k>Exécuteur</k> seulement. Les attaques de tir de cette unité ont <k>[Ignore le Couvert]</k>.
description.it: Solo unità di <k>Executioner</k>. Le armi da tiro di questa unità hanno <k>[Ignora la Copertura]</k>.
description.ja: <k>エクスキューショナー</k>・ユニットのみ。このユニットの射撃攻撃は<k>［遮蔽無効］</k>を持つ。
description.ko: <k>처형</k> 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 <k>[엄폐 무시]</k>를 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限<k>处决者</k>单位。该单位的远程攻击拥有<k>[无视掩体]</k>。

name.ja: 魂痕探知機（アップグレード）

description.en: Huntsman unit only. This unit’s ranged attacks have +6" R.
description.de: Nur für eine Jagdhund-Einheit. Die Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit haben +6" R.
description.es: Solo unidad Cazador. Los ataques a distancia de esta unidad tienen +6" al Alc.
description.fr: Unité de Chasseur seulement. Les attaques de tir de cette unité ont +6" en P.
description.it: Solo unità di Huntsman. Gli attacchi da tiro di questa unità hanno +6" G.
description.ja: ハンツマン・ユニットのみ。このユニットの射撃攻撃は【射】に+6mvの修正を受ける。
description.ko: 사냥 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 사거리 +6"를 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限猎手小队单位。该单位的远程攻击拥有 +6" R。

description.en: Knight Tyrant model only. When this unit is selected to shoot, select one enemy unit within 24" of this unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range until this unit has shot.
description.de: Nur für ein Tyrannenritter-Modell. Wenn diese Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird, wähle eine feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 24" um diese Einheit. Jene feindliche Einheit hat +6" Entdeckungsreichweite, bis diese Einheit geschossen hat.
description.es: Solo miniatura Caballero Tirano. Cuando esta unidad se elige para disparar, elige 1 unidad enemiga a 24" o menos de esta unidad. Esa unidad enemiga tiene +6" al alcance de detección hasta que esta unidad haya disparado.
description.fr: Figurine de Chevalier Tyran seulement. Quand cette unité est choisie pour tirer, choisissez une unité ennemie à 24" ou moins d’elle. L’unité ennemie choisie a +6" en portée de détection jusqu’à ce que votre unité ait tiré.
description.it: Solo modelli di Cavaliere Tyrant. Quando questa unità viene scelta per tirare, seleziona un’unità nemica entro 24" da questa unità. Quell’unità nemica ha +6" alla distanza di individuazione finché questa unità non ha tirato.
description.ja: ナイト・タイラント・兵のみ。このユニットが射撃を宣言した時、このユニットの24mv以内に一部でも入っている敵ユニットを1個選択する。このユニットの射撃が完了するまでの間、選択された敵ユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
description.ko: 폭군 기사 모델 전용. 이 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때, 이 유닛의 24" 내에 있는 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 이 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료할 때까지 그 적 유닛에 발각 범위 +6"를 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限暴君骑士模型。在该单位被选择进行射击时，选择一个位于该单位 24" 内的敌方单位。直到该单位完成射击前，那个敌方单位的侦测范围增加 6"。

name.ja: 憎悪に満たされた支配

description.en: Knight Tyrant model only. This unit can re-roll rolls to determine the A of a weapon.
description.de: Nur für ein Tyrannenritter-Modell. Diese Einheit kann Würfe wiederholen, um die A einer Waffe zu bestimmen.
description.es: Solo miniatura Caballero Tirano. Esta unidad puede repetir las tiradas para determinar los A de un arma.
description.fr: Figurine de Chevalier Tyran seulement. Cette unité peut relancer les jets pour déterminer les A d’une arme.
description.it: Solo modelli di Cavaliere Tyrant. Questa unità può ripetere i tiri per determinare la caratteristica A di un’arma.
description.ja: ナイト・タイラント・兵のみ。このユニットは武器の【数】を決定する際のダイスロールをリロールできる。
description.ko: 폭군 기사 모델 전용. 이 유닛이 무기의 공격을 정하는 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限暴君骑士模型。该单位在掷骰决定武器的 A 属性时可以进行重掷。

name.ja: 偶像たる異端の騎士（オーラ）

description.en: Chaos Knights model only. While a friendly Damned unit is within 6" of this model, when you target that unit with the Heroic Intervention stratagem, that use is ‑1 CP.
description.de: Nur für ein Chaosritter-Modell. Solange sich eine befreundete verdammte Einheit innerhalb von 6" um dieses Modell befindet, kostet dich der Einsatz der Gefechtsoption Heroische Intervention mit jener Einheit als Ziel für jenen Einsatz ‑1 BP.
description.es: Solo miniatura Caballeros del Caos. Mientras una unidad Condenado amiga esté a 6" o menos de esta miniatura, cuando tomes esa unidad como blanco de la estratagema Intervención heroica, ese uso cuesta 1 PM menos.
description.fr: Figurine de Chevalier du Chaos seulement. Tant qu’une unité Damnée amie est à 6" ou moins de cette figurine, quand vous ciblez l’unité avec le stratagème Intervention Héroïque, cette utilisation se fait à ‑1 PC.
description.it: Solo modelli di Cavaliere del Caos. Fintanto che un’unità Dannata amica si trova entro 6" da questo modello, quando scegli quell’unità come bersaglio dello stratagemma Intervento Eroico, quell’utilizzo costa 1 PC in meno.
description.ja: ケイオスナイト・兵のみ。味方呪われし者・ユニットがこの兵の6mv以内に一部でも入っている間、自軍がこのユニットを対象に『英雄的介入』策略を使用する場合、そのCPコストは-1される。
description.ko: 카오스 기사 모델 전용. 아군 전락자 유닛이 이 모델의 6" 내에 있는 동안, 그 유닛을 대상으로 영웅적 개입 스트라타젬을 사용할 때, CP 소모 -1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限混沌骑士模型。当一个己方被诅咒者单位位于该模型的 6" 时，您对那个单位使用英勇介入计谋所消耗的 CP -1。

name.ja: 冷酷なる鞭導者（オーラ）

description.en: Chaos Knights model only. While a friendly Damned unit is within 6" of this model, when that unit is selected to make a normal/advance/fall‑back move that unit has +2" M until the end of the phase.
description.de: Nur für ein Chaosritter-Modell. Solange sich eine befreundete verdammte Einheit innerhalb von 6" um dieses Modell befindet, hat jene Einheit, wenn sie gewählt wird, eine normale/Vorrücken-/Rückzugsbewegung auszuführen, +2" B.
description.es: Solo miniatura Caballeros del Caos. Mientras una unidad Condenado amiga esté a 6" o menos de esta miniatura, cuando esa unidad se elige para hacer un movimiento normal/de avanzar/de retroceder esa unidad tienen +2" a M.
description.fr: Figurine de Chevalier du Chaos seulement. Tant qu’une unité Damnée amie est à 6" ou moins de cette figurine, quand l’unité amie est choisie pour faire un mouvement normal/d’avance/de retraite elle a +2" en M.
description.it: Solo modelli di Cavaliere del Caos. Fintanto che un’unità Dannata amica si trova entro 6" da questo modello, quando quell’unità viene scelta per effettuare un movimento normale/di avanzata/di ripiegamento ha +2" M.
description.ja: ケイオスナイト・兵のみ。この兵の6mv以内に一部でも入っている味方呪われし者・ユニットが通常移動/全力移動/退却移動を宣言した時、その味方ユニットの【移】は+2mvの修正を受ける。
description.ko: 카오스 기사 모델 전용. 아군 전락자 유닛이 이 모델의 6" 내에 있는 동안, 그 유닛이 일반/신속/후퇴 이동을 수행하기 위해 지정됐을 때 이동 +2"를 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限混沌骑士模型。在一个位于该模型 6" 内的己方被诅咒者单位被选择进行一次常规/突进/后撤移动时，那个单位拥有 +2" M。

description.en: **CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test.

**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. At the end of your Command phase, select one objective marker the bearer is within range of and that you control. That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase. In addition, until you lose control of that objective marker, it has the Deathly Terror ability as if it were a **CHAOS KNIGHTS** model from your army.

**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. Each time you roll dice to randomly select which Dread abilities are active for your army, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can re-roll one or both results rolled.
**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks, and a 5+ invulnerable save against melee attacks.

**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1. While the bearer is using the Diabolic Power ability, its melee weapons have the **[LANCE]** ability

**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. Add 2 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Malefic Surge, you can re-roll the Leadership test taken to see if it suffers any mortal wounds.

**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. Add 1 to the bearer’s Toughness characteristic. While the bearer is using the Unnatural Fortitude ability, each time an attack with a Damage characteristic of 1 is allocated to the bearer, add 1 to any armour saving throw made against that attack.

**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. The bearer’s ranged weapons have the **[ASSAULT]** ability. While the bearer is using the Unholy Hunger ability, it can ignore any or all modifiers to its Move characteristic and/or to Advance rolls made for its unit.

**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. You can re-roll Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit. In addition, once per battle, in your Charge phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, the bearer’s unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. The bearer’s ranged weapons have the **[ASSAULT]** ability. In addition, once per battle, in the Fight phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Fights First ability.

**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. The bearer has the Deep Strike ability. In addition, once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. The bearer has a Save characteristic of 2+. In addition, once per battle, at the start of either player’s Command phase, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, the bearer regains up to D6 lost wounds.

**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. Once per turn, when your opponent targets a unit from their army within 12” of this model with a **stratagem**, you can use this ability. If you do, increase the CP cost of that use of that **stratagem** by 1CP.

**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. The bearer has the Stealth ability. In addition, once per battle, after you make a saving throw for the bearer, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.
**WAR DOG** model only. The bearer has the Super-heavy Walker ability.
**WAR DOG** model only. While a friendly **WAR DOG** model is within 6" of the bearer, each time that model makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
**WAR DOG** model only. The bearer’s ranged weapons have the **[ASSAULT]** ability.
**WAR DOG** model only. Each time an attack targets the bearer, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. You can re‑roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

**KNIGHT ABOMINANT** model only. The bearer has the following ability:

**Octagram of Conjuration (Aura):** While a friendly **WAR DOG** model is within 9” of this model, after that **WAR DOG** model has shot, you can select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test.

**CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. At the start of your Command phase, select one Dread ability to be active for the bearer until the start of your next Command phase, in addition to the Dread abilities active for your army.

**TITANIC CHAOS KNIGHTS** model only. In your Command phase, select one other **CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER** model within 9” of the bearer. If the bearer has one or more Aura abilities that affect friendly **WAR DOG** units, until the start of your next Command phase, the selected **CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER** model is affected by those Aura abilities as well.
Each time an attack is made with this weapon, if the target is more than 18" away from the bearer, an unmodified successful Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit.

The pilots of these fell machines revel in their awesome power, levelling fortification after fortification.

Few foes can stand up to the immense power of its devastating weapons, which make short work of some of the toughest armour ever designed in the galaxy.

As determined as they ever were to exterminate their foes, now they take on such tasks with unrestrained glee, relishing in the burning of swathes of the enemy or the carving of foes with their chainfists.

They unleash this power in terrifying waves, corrupting and mutating those nearby, and incinerating distant foes with blasts from their volkite combustors. In combat, they thrash coiling, warp‑wrought appendages, crushing anything that remains untainted.

description.en: Each time an attack made with a [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] weapon results in a critical wound, the attack sequence for that attack ends and the target unit suffers a number of mortal wounds equal to the D characteristic of that weapon. These are inflicted after resolving any normal damage inflicted by those attacks. Mortal wounds inflicted by [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] weapons can damage a maximum of one model for each critical wound; any remaining mortal wounds inflicted by that attack are lost. Example: An attack made with a [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] weapon with a D characteristic of 3 results in a critical wound against an Intercessor Squad, so inflicts 3 mortal wounds. The first 2 mortal wounds are sufficient to destroy 1 Intercessor model, so the remaining mortal wound is lost.
